name: Moussaka Di Mare (Eggplant and Tuna)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice the eggplant into 1/2-inch slices. Sprinkle with salt and let stand for 15 minutes. Pat dry, then place on an oiled baking sheet.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons margarine in a skillet. Add oil until saute the onion and garlic until limp and tender. Add drained tomatoes, tuna, tomato paste, cinnamon, 1/4 teaspoon salt and pepper. Mix well and heat for 3-4 minutes, stirring often.
3. Melt remaining margarine in a saucepan; stir in flour and 1/4 teaspoon salt. Cook for 1 minute. Gradually add milk until the mixture boils and thickens. Pour into beaten eggs and cheese, stirring constantly. Add the cheese and blend well.
4. Arrange half the eggplant slices in a shallow 2-quart baking dish. Cover with tuna mixture, then top with remaining eggplant slices. Pour the cheese mixture on top.
5. Bake in preheated 350-degree oven for 40 minutes or until golden brown.
